docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO JUL-06-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00 TRIAL OF MAY-29-1992 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY O'BRIEN BRIDGET AS TO DEFENDANT O'DRISCOLL AILEEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-29-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-06-1992, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO JUL-28-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF O'BRIEN BRIDGET RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT O'DRISCOLL AILEEN $450.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $450.00, STIPULATION BY PARTIES THAT DEFT. WILL PAY PLAINTIFF $450.00 ON 7/28/92. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT O'DRISCOLL AILEEN
